title: MCExpansion
description: This mod has added dozens of new synthesis formulas, as well as new weapons and armor synthesized using the game's existing materials as much as possible. We have also added more paintings and crops, and we want to expand the content of the game as much as
body:
# 关于
# ABOUT

这是我和我的朋友之前为期末考试创建的一个小模组。它添加了一些新的物品和作物，但不幸的是，它不包括任何新的结构或生物群落（我的能力有限，抱歉:<）。我和我的朋友想和大家分享一下。如果你遇到任何问题或觉得有什么我可以改进的地方，请告诉我，我会尽最大努力做出必要的改变。如果你需要开发文档，我可以分享我准备的Word文件。谢谢你玩！

This is a small mod my friend and I created for our final exam. It adds some new items and crops, but unfortunately, it does not include any new structures or biomes (I'm sorry for the limitation of my skills :<). My friend and I would like to share it with everyone. If you encounter any issues or have suggestions for improvement, please let me know—I will do my best to make the necessary changes. If you need the development documentation, I can share the Word file I prepared. Thank you for playing!

## 这个模组添加了什么？
## What does this mod add?

1.0版本：你认为最初的铜和绿宝石太丰富了，但似乎毫无意义吗？我们在原版中引入了新的铜制作配方，使其可用于制作铜工具和盔甲。此外，我们还将其与木材和石头相结合，创造了新的木制和石头盔甲，最大限度地利用了现有的游戏材料。我们还添加了制作锁链甲和绿宝石的合成表，以及一些新奇的食物和绘画。此mod不需要依赖项。如果你想稍微扩展Fabric游戏的内容，试试我们的mod。再次感谢您的参与！ PS：有些合成表可能会显示如下的情况：

比如水果沙拉里的水果全是苹果，实际上你可以用其他的水果（只要是游戏里提示的即可，尽管它们通常会显示全是苹果或者全是蓝莓），具体可以查看图片目录下关于水果沙拉的合成配方截图

所以请不要在意是否需要按规定制作，我这么做只是想让更多材料发挥它们的作用！

Do you think the original copper and emeralds are abundant but rather useless? We have introduced new crafting recipes for copper in the vanilla game, allowing it to be used for making copper tools and armor. In addition, we have combined it with wood and stone to create new wooden and stone armor, maximizing the use of existing in-game materials. We have also added crafting recipes for chainmail armor and emeralds, as well as some novel foods and paintings.

This mod has no dependencies. If you want to slightly expand the content of your Fabric game, give our mod a try. Thanks again for your support!

P.S. Some crafting recipes may display in the following way:

For example, all the fruits in the fruit salad recipe show as apples, but you can actually use other fruits (as long as they are suggested in the game—though they usually display as all apples or all blueberries). For details, you can check the screenshot of the fruit salad crafting recipe in the image directory.

So please don’t worry about following the displayed recipe strictly; I just want to make more materials useful!


1.5版本大更新（至少我认为它挺大的:D）：我们添加了火枪、各种果树的树苗还有新的交易箱和酿酒桶以及椅子！并且我们还花了长达几个月的时间把贴图重新绘制，如果你想看这些贴图的变化有多么大，可以对比下新的图片和以前的图片，感谢我的朋友Tian！

关于火枪：最普通的火枪命中率非常低，大家可以选择滑膛枪或者是霰弹枪，弹药有普通弹药和无烟弹药两种，它们除了在射击时造成的烟雾大小不同以外没有任何区别。由于我技术不足，装填弹药时即使装填动作停止，也不会自动切换到射击状态，具体来说，需要手持火枪，然后长按右键，等到动画结束后的一秒或者两秒松开即可，火枪的激发装置可以用来判断是否可以射击。

关于酿酒桶：酿酒桶可以把农作物放进去，然后合成不同的饮品，比如所有水果都可以合成水果汁

关于果树：果实按右键可以摘取

关于交易箱：有地狱交易箱和普通交易箱，它类似星露谷物语里的出货箱，把你想卖的产品放进去，每天早上都会自动兑换为绿宝石或者黄金（普通交易箱兑换绿宝石，地狱交易箱兑换黄金）

Major Update for Version 1.5 (At least I think it's a major one :D)

We have added firearms, saplings of various fruit trees, new trading chests, brewing barrels, and chairs! Moreover, we spent several months redrawing all the textures. If you want to see how dramatic the texture changes are, you can compare the new images with the old ones. Special thanks to my friend Tian!

About Firearms: The most basic firearm has extremely low accuracy. You can choose between a musket or a shotgun instead. There are two types of ammunition: regular ammo and smokeless ammo—they differ only in the amount of smoke produced when fired, with no other distinctions. Due to my technical limitations, after the reloading animation finishes, the firearm will not automatically switch to firing mode. Specifically, you need to hold the firearm, press and hold the right mouse button, and release it one or two seconds after the animation ends. You can tell if the firearm is ready to fire by checking its firing mechanism.
About Brewing Barrels: You can put crops into brewing barrels to craft different beverages. For example, all fruits can be made into fruit juice.
About Fruit Trees: You can harvest the fruits by right-clicking on them.
About Trading Chests: There are Nether trading chests and regular trading chests, which work similarly to the shipping bin in Stardew Valley. Place the items you want to sell inside, and they will be automatically converted into emeralds or gold every morning (regular trading chests exchange for emeralds; Nether trading chests exchange for gold).

### List of Acknowledgments
### 《感谢我的朋友》

Xuanxuan(Resource)
Chloe(Resource)
Tian(Resource)
Yingying(Resource)

Language Support（语言支持）:English 简体中文（Ranking is not in any particular order/排名不分先后）
